title: 11L Liter Plastic Washing Bowl Rectangular Multi-Purpose Basin Mixing Pot Sink Tidy Organizers (Black)
features: 11 Litres Washing Up Bowl Rectangular Plastic Multi-Purpose Storage Home, Office, and Factory. perfect for everyday use.
Durable, made from high quality food safe PP, ideal for the kitchen, utility room, caravan, or camping.
Moulded Handles, the handles are moulded into the rim making it easy to lift and carry when full.
Easy to Clean, simply rinse or wipe clean. Protects the sink from stains, marks and odours when peeling vegetables or washing up.
Capacity 11L, Outer measuring approximately 37.5cm x 32cm x 14cm.
